title: Crispy Dutch Chicken Wrap
description: A delicious wrap filled with crispy fried chicken, topped with crunchy vegetables and creamy sauce. Perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: 2. Cut the Dutch chicken breast into thin strips.
3. In a bowl, mix together xtra crispy chicken seasoning and a pinch of salt.
4. Toss the chicken strips in the seasoning mixture until evenly coated.
5. Fry the chicken in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes.
6. Warm the xtra crispy wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
7. Assemble the wrap by placing the fried chicken on the wrap, then topping with crispy lettuce, sliced tomato, and a dollop of wrap sauce.
8. Fold the wrap and serve immediately.
